meaning: adj.柠檬的,柠檬黄的n.柠檬黄,黄水晶
examples: Citrine is given as a symbol of hope, youth, health, and fidelity.
Citrine and topaz birthstone rings come in a variety of shapes and sizes.
It is also lighter in color than most citrine that you find on the market.
Shapeless shift dresses, circle cut out skirts and boucle swing coats came in lurid shades of citrine and magenta.
Citrine gemstones adorn the button lock and the thumb stud, pairing beautifully with the chestnut wood scale, the gold accents of the bolster and the elegant black blade.
